top_signals.summary: US stocks fell ahead of Alphabet Inc.’s earnings as traders waited for the clearest read yet on whether the vast sums technology hyperscalers are pouring into artificial intelligence will pay off.

top_signals.title: Weather Optics: Unpacking Tropical Storm Bertha’s Impact on Freight
top_signals.summary:
SummaryView Transcript Tropical Storm Bertha is crawling along the Gulf Coast, raising concerns about significant coastal flooding and heavy rainfall. While this hurricane season is predicted to be quiet due to El Niño, Weather Optics’ Joshua Feldman explains why slow-moving storms like Bertha can still pose a serious threat to logistics and supply chains, especially […]

top_signals.title: Trimble’s Big Move: Unpacking the Transportation Division Sale
top_signals.summary:
SummaryView Transcript Trimble is reportedly selling its transportation division, including major acquisitions like Transporeon and PeopleNet. Bart de Muynck breaks down the challenges of integrating disparate carrier and shipper tech worlds, poor market timing for acquisitions, and why even large enterprises struggle to unify complex platforms in a rapidly evolving logistics tech landscape. Discover how […]

top_signals.title: Prologis Makes £14 Billion Best and Final Offer for UK’s Segro
top_signals.summary: Prologis Inc. has submitted a best and final offer for Segro Plc that values the UK’s largest publicly traded landlord at about £14 billion ($18.7 billion).
